name: Radio Group
description: Groups radio buttons for mutually exclusive single selection.

props.name: direction
props.description: Layout direction of the grouped radios.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name propagated to child radios that don't set their own.

props.name: size
props.description: Size propagated to child radios that don't set their own size.

props.name: colorScheme
props.description: Color scheme propagated to child radios that don't set their own.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected value. Reflects the checked radio's value. Can be set programmatically.

props.name: required
props.description: Mark the group as required — propagated to child radios and exposed as `aria-required` on the group.

slots.name: label
slots.description: Group label rendered above the radios.
